summary: Comprehensive testing of Fulfilment and Reports admin features completed. All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend integration verified - Fulfilment tab shows Orders, Today & Tomorrow, Draft Orders sub-tabs with filters. Reports tab shows Executive, Revenue, Autoship, Products, Customers, Pet Soul, Operations, Reviews, Financial sections. City filter working in both Fulfilment and Reports. Meilisearch search service restarted and working with 392 products indexed.

minor.issue: Search service shows initialized=false after backend restart until manually triggered or backend restarted again. This is because Meilisearch connection is async and may not complete before first request.

critical_code_review_comments: FulfilmentManager.jsx correctly uses authHeaders for all API calls
ReportsManager.jsx fetches all report data in parallel using Promise.all for better performance
SelectItem empty value bug was fixed by using 'all' as placeholder value instead of empty string
City filter in Reports correctly passes empty string when 'All Cities' is selected
Fulfilment batch view shows Kitchen Sheet and Delivery Sheet buttons (UI only, no backend implementation yet)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fulfilment and Reports features fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/fulfilment (with date_range, city, status, order_type filters), GET /api/admin/fulfilment/batch-view, GET /api/admin/draft-orders, GET /api/admin/reports/* (executive-summary, revenue-by-city, daily-sales, product-performance, autoship-performance, customer-intelligence, pet-intelligence, operations, reviews, financial). All require Basic Auth. Meilisearch search working with 392 products indexed.

frontend_ui_tests.fulfilment_tab_visible: PASS - 📦 Fulfilment tab appears in admin panel
frontend_ui_tests.fulfilment_orders_subtab: PASS - Orders sub-tab with filters (Today/Tomorrow/This Week, Cities, Statuses, Types)
frontend_ui_tests.fulfilment_batch_subtab: PASS - Today & Tomorrow sub-tab shows Batch Summary with Total Orders, Autoship Orders, Custom Cakes, Total Items
frontend_ui_tests.fulfilment_drafts_subtab: PASS - Draft Orders sub-tab with Create Draft Order button
frontend_ui_tests.reports_tab_visible: PASS - 📊 Reports tab appears in admin panel
frontend_ui_tests.reports_executive_tab: PASS - Shows Total Revenue, Total Orders, Active Autoship, Repeat Rate, AOV
frontend_ui_tests.reports_revenue_tab: PASS - Shows Revenue by City and Daily Sales
frontend_ui_tests.reports_products_tab: PASS - Shows Top Products by Revenue table
frontend_ui_tests.reports_pets_tab: PASS - Shows Popular Breeds and Upcoming Birthdays
frontend_ui_tests.reports_reviews_tab: PASS - Shows Total Reviews, Pending Approval, Average Rating
frontend_ui_tests.reports_financial_tab: PASS - Shows Total Discounts, Shipping Revenue, Cancelled Orders
frontend_ui_tests.reports_city_filter: PASS - City filter dropdown works (All Cities, Bangalore, Mumbai, Gurugram, Delhi)
frontend_ui_tests.search_typeahead: PASS - Shows 8 products and 4 collections for 'cake' query
